title: Commission full body OC artwork

author: Dandrista
title: YouTube intro artist for Jinx-themed
content: I’m looking for an artist for a YouTube channel intro! Experience drawing 2D anime is a must. It would be a 10–15 second intro. Jinx-themed! Contact: melerod72@gmail.com
